info.name: Vadgr API
info.description:
E2E test suite for the Vadgr API.

Run order matters -- requests use collection variables set by earlier requests.

Flow: Providers -> Health -> Create Agent -> Poll Ready -> Get -> Cosmetic Update -> Substantive Update -> Poll Updated -> Busy Update (409) -> Run Agent -> List Runs -> List Agents -> Minimal Create -> Validation Tests -> Delete Tests -> Runs -> Computer Use.
